zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Lamprey於大約1615年出生在英國英格蘭戴文武爾時，他的父親Henry Lamprey27歲，母親Mrs. Henry Lamprey23歲。他於1641年與Gillyen Julien Ann Morris在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1660年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓被列為cooper。他去世於1700年8月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Lamprey于大约1615年出生在英国英格兰戴文武爾时，他的父亲Henry Lamprey27岁，母亲Mrs. Henry Lamprey23岁。他于1641年与Gillyen Julien Ann Morris在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1660年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓被列为cooper。他去世于1700年8月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lamprey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English lamprey ‘lamprey’ (Old English lamprede), an eel-like fish which was a highly prized food among the upper classes in medieval England, especially in pies, and required as payment of rent by some lords of manors. The nickname may have been given to someone who provided lampreys for the lord's table or who resembled a lamprey, perhaps a slippery fellow or a lecher.

variants.name: Lansberry
meanings: English: from Bedfordshire and Northamptonshire, originally from Launchbury, a development from   Lamprey  .
Possibly an altered form of German   Landsberg  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Lamprey was born about 1615, in Uffculme, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Lamprey, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. Henry Lamprey, was 23. He married Gillyen Julien Ann Morris in 1641, in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. In 1660, at the age of 46, his occupation is listed as cooper in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 7 August 1700, in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Lamprey est né environ 1615, à Uffculme, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Lamprey, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Henry Lamprey, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Gillyen Julien Ann Morris en 1641, à Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. En 1660, à l’âge de 46 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est cooper à Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 7 août 1700, à Hampton, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Lamprey um 1615 in Uffculme, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Lamprey 27 und seine Mutter Mrs. Henry Lamprey 23. Er hat 1641 in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Gillyen Julien Ann Morris geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1660, als er 46 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als cooper in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 7. August 1700 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Lamprey è nato il circa 1615 nel Uffculme, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Lamprey, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Henry Lamprey, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Gillyen Julien Ann Morris nel 1641, nel Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1660, all'età di 46 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come cooper nel Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 7 agosto 1700, nel Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Lampreyが約1615年にイギリスイギリスデボンウフクウルメで生まれた時，父Henry Lampreyは27歳，母Mrs. Henry Lampreyは23歳であった。1641年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストンでGillyen Julien Ann Morrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1660年，46歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクハンプトンでの職業はcooperと記録されている。彼は1700年8月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアハンプトンで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Lamprey(이)가 대략 1615년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 프컬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Lamprey(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Henry Lamprey(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1641년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴에서 Gillyen Julien Ann Morris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1660년, 46세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 함프턴에서 cooper이었다. 그는 1700년 8월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 함프턴에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Lamprey nasceu aproximadamente 1615, em Uffculme, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Lamprey, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Henry Lamprey, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Gillyen Julien Ann Morris em 1641, em Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1660, com 46 anos, sua profissão aparece como cooper em Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1700, em Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Lamprey родился около 1615 г. в местности уффкулм, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Lamprey было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Henry Lamprey, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Gillyen Julien Ann Morris в 1641 г. в местности бостон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1660 году, в возрасте 46 лет,  он работал по профессии cooper в местности хамптон, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 7 августа 1700 г. в местности хамптон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Lamprey nació aproximadamente 1615, en Uffculme, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Lamprey, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs. Henry Lamprey, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Gillyen Julien Ann Morris en 1641, en Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1660, a la edad de 46 años, su ocupación registrada era cooper en Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1700, en Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 86 años.
